calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2023 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Maria Orellana-Santos, self represented Plaintiff appeared. Spanish interpreter provided by court certified Spanish interpreter, Kenneth Wright, oath on file. Plaintiff stated she no longer wished to proceed with this case. The Court vacated sanctions and dismissed the case without prejudice. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2022 Continued To Feb-28-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanction $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC has been cont'd to Feb-28-2023. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: JLee; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2022 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-29-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Continued To Sep-28-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
